Dirichlet Orbital

Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3303-04-06
Galactic News Halsey's Campaign Concludes
Former Federal President Jasmina Halsey's relief campaign for refugees at Dirichlet Orbital concluded successfully, with hundreds of pilots eliminating agitators in Yum Kamcabi and delivering supplies.
3303-03-30
Community Goal Halsey Requests Relief
Former Federal President Jasmina Halsey appealed for relief for refugees at Dirichlet Orbital in the Yum Kamcabi system. The Yum Kamcabi Purple Life Industry pledged rewards for delivery of supplies, while the Revolutionary Patani Labour placed kill orders on wanted ships.
3303-02-09
Galactic News Halsey's Campaign Reaches Successful Conclusion
Former Federal President Jasmina Halsey's campaign to establish a rehabilitation centre for war victims concludes successfully. Hundreds of pilots delivered construction materials to Dirichlet Orbital.
3303-02-02
Community Goal Halsey to Build Refugee Centre
Former Federal President Jasmina Halsey announces plans to build a rehabilitation centre for victims of the Federal-Imperial conflict. The Yum Kamcabi Purple Life Industry supports the campaign financially.
